name: linkding
short_desc: A self-hosted bookmark manager designed to be minimal, fast, and easy to set up.
author: sissbruecker
description: linkding is a bookmark manager that you can host yourself. It's designed be to be minimal, fast, and easy to set up using Docker. The name comes from: link which is often used as a synonym for URLs and bookmarks in common language; Ding which is German for thing;...so basically something for managing your links
